search_document:
User Request: Inventory dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Inventory Levels
Type: chart
Description: Current stock levels of products
Title: Top Products by Sales
Type: table
Description: Products with the highest sales volume
Title: Total Inventory Value
Type: kpi
Description: Overall value of inventory in stock
Title: Low Stock Alerts
Type: list
Description: Products that are below reorder level
Title: Inventory Turnover Rate
Type: chart
Description: Rate at which inventory is sold and replaced

sql_queries.title: Inventory Levels
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitsInStock FROM Products

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales
sql_queries.description: Products with the highest sales volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductID, p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Inventory Value
sql_queries.description: Overall value of inventory in stock
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(UnitPrice * UnitsInStock) AS TotalInventoryValue FROM Products

sql_queries.title: Low Stock Alerts
sql_queries.description: Products that are below reorder level
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitsInStock, ReorderLevel FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock < ReorderLevel

sql_queries.title: Inventory Turnover Rate
sql_queries.description: Rate at which inventory is sold and replaced
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductID, p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) / NULLIF(p.UnitsInStock, 0) AS TurnoverRate FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.ProductName
